title: LA and school expenditure: 2024 to 2025 financial year
body: "A summary of data from the consistent financial reporting and S251 outturn surveys covering:   local authority spending on education services and children’s and young people’s services the income and expenditure of local authority-maintained schools in England the latest position on school revenue balances   We will also publish the income and expenditure of local-authority-maintained schools data on the school financial benchmarking service at the end of the year. You can download datasets for all local-authority-maintained schools (and equivalent data for academies) from the data source section.   Workforce and finance statistics team     Email finance.statistics@education.gov.uk         "
